info.title: Information Center
info.fair_play_description: This platform uses verifiable fair algorithms to ensure every round is provably unbiased
info.what_is_rtp: RTP represents the expected percentage of wagers returned to players over the long term
info.vip_levels_description: Reach deposit and wagering thresholds to level up your VIP tier and unlock exclusive perks
info.vip_system_description: {{count}} tiers from Common to Oracle XII. Tiers are calculated based on your total wagered amount. Higher tiers unlock more privileges.
info.vip_fee_detail: Standard rates: Common/Bronze 0%, Silver 10%, Gold 20%, Diamond 50%, Genesis+ 100%
info.vip_bonus_detail: Daily login bonus is awarded based on tier multiplier, up to 8x
info.vip_danmaku_detail: Exclusive danmaku colors and priority display — higher tiers stand out more
info.vip_max_bet_detail: Higher tier = higher max bet per round. Oracle XII can bet up to 10 quadrillion
info.double_xp_desc: ⚡ XP Boost item — earn double XP
info.event_bonus_desc: 🎉 Event bonus — limited-time bonus XP events
info.vip_pass_desc_p1: VIP Pass can be purchased at

xpLevel.fair_play_static_rules: All RTP and payout logic follows fixed rules
xpLevel.rtp_explanation_detail: RTP is the return to player rate. If the RTP is 97%, over a large number of rounds, every 100 ZXC wagered returns 97 ZXC on average. The remaining 3% is the house edge.
xpLevel.fee_formula_label: The game fee uses a uniform formula:
xpLevel.fee_max_discount_prefix: Tier discount depends on membership level, up to
xpLevel.chest_probabilities_desc: Each chest has different rarity weights, and each opening is independent. If the guaranteed rarity is not hit after the pity count, the next chest is guaranteed to trigger.

game_data.coinflip_desc: Simple 2-choice. Pick heads or tails, round reveals a fixed side.
game_data.coinflip_fairness: Determined by roundId hash parity (heads/tails), verifiable.
game_data.roulette_desc: European 37 slots (0-36), multiple bet types simultaneously, system totals payout multipliers.
game_data.roulette_fairness: Winning number generated by roundId hash mod 37.
game_data.sicbo_desc: 3 dice, supports Big/Small and specific sum bets.
game_data.sicbo_probability: Big 107/216 (49.54%); Small 107/216 (49.54%); sum varies by distribution.
game_data.sicbo_fairness: 3 dice points derived from same round hash, traceable.
game_data.slots_desc: 7 symbols, 3 reels independent. Win on triple match or any pair.
game_data.slots_fairness: 3 reel results from different segments of the same seed, fixed rules.
game_data.horse_desc: 6 horses with fixed odds and weights. Lower-odds horses have higher win rates.
game_data.horse_payout: Blaze 2.5x (38.5%), Thunder 3.7x (26.0%), Phantom 6.2x (15.4%), Night Blade 10x (9.6%), Frost Fang 14x (6.7%), Meteor 25x (3.8%).
game_data.horse_fairness: FNV hash + fixed weights, each round seed = roundId.
game_data.shoot_dragon_gate_desc: Open left and right gates first, then the middle card. Win if middle card falls between the gates.
game_data.shoot_dragon_gate_payout: Middle in range 2x; Out of range 0x; Same as gate 1x (push).
game_data.shoot_dragon_gate_probability: Determined by the relationship of 3 card values (fixed 3 draws per round).
game_data.shoot_dragon_gate_fairness: Left/right gates and middle card independently drawn from the same round's random process.
game_data.blackjack_desc: Supports start / hit / stand; dealer rules fixed (hits below 17).
game_data.blackjack_probability: Depends on current hand decisions, not fixed single win rate.
game_data.blackjack_fairness: Each card generated via seed + index, replayable.
game_data.crash_desc: Multiplier grows over time. Players cash out before crash point for current multiplier payout.
game_data.crash_payout: Payout = Bet × Current Multiplier (0x if crashed).
game_data.crash_fairness: Crash point derived from round hash, cannot be modified after round starts.
game_data.duel_desc: Both players pick heads or tails, one coin flip decides. System treats player as p1.
game_data.duel_payout: p1 wins 1.96x; Loss 0x; Same pick or tie returns 1x.
game_data.duel_probability: When picks are opposite, single round win rate 50%.
game_data.duel_fairness: Outcome determined by single hash coin flip, fixed rules.
game_data.bingo_desc: Players pick 1-10 numbers, system draws 30 winning numbers per round.
game_data.bingo_probability: Matches follow hypergeometric distribution (more picks = higher probability of high matches).
game_data.bingo_fairness: Each round expands round hash into 30 unique numbers.
game_data.poker_desc: Fixed 5-card hand evaluation, multiplier based on hand rank.
game_data.poker_payout: Straight Flush 50x, Four of a Kind 20x, Full House 10x, Flush 6x, Straight 4x, Three of a Kind 3x, Two Pair 2x, One Pair 1x, Royal Flush 100x.
game_data.poker_probability: Hand probabilities based on 5-card combinations (high multipliers have very low odds).
game_data.poker_fairness: 5 cards drawn from same seed by index, result verifiable.
game_data.bluffdice_desc: Currently uses target sum 18 to calculate difference from total of 5 dice.
game_data.bluffdice_probability: 5 dice sum approximates bell curve, highest probability around 18.
game_data.bluffdice_fairness: 5 dice generated by seed + action in one pass, fixed payout formula.
